name: Canada Post
description: Canada Post is the primary postal operator in Canada, offering a developer platform with REST and SOAP web services for e-commerce merchants and solution providers. APIs cover shipping label generation, rate calculation, parcel tracking, address validation (AddressComplete), parcel pickup scheduling, returns management, post office location lookup, and service information.

offers.name: Canada Post Developer Program
offers.description: Free developer program registration with API keys issued per environment (sandbox and production). Supports REST and SOAP protocols with XML request/response bodies.

hasPart.name: Canada Post Rating Web Service
hasPart.description: Returns available shipping services and their rates for a given origin postal code, destination, parcel weight, and dimensions.

hasPart.name: Canada Post Contract Shipping Web Service
hasPart.description: Enables commercial customers with a Canada Post parcel agreement to create domestic and international shipments, generate shipping labels, manage shipment groups, and transmit manifests.

hasPart.name: Canada Post Non-Contract Shipping Web Service
hasPart.description: Allows general businesses and VentureOne card holders to create domestic and international shipments and generate labels without a formal Canada Post parcel agreement.

hasPart.name: Canada Post Tracking Web Service
hasPart.description: Provides parcel tracking capabilities using a PIN, DNC, or customer reference number. Returns tracking summary or full tracking details.

hasPart.name: Canada Post AddressComplete API
hasPart.description: Address validation and auto-complete web service backed by Canada Post's authoritative Canadian address database. Implements a two-step Find/Retrieve flow.

hasPart.name: Canada Post Pickup Web Service
hasPart.description: Enables e-commerce platforms to schedule, modify, retrieve, and cancel on-demand parcel pickups.

hasPart.name: Canada Post Returns Web Service
hasPart.description: Generates return shipping labels for authorized returns and open returns. Supports both REST and SOAP protocols.

hasPart.name: Canada Post Find a Post Office API
hasPart.description: Returns a list of Canada Post retail post office locations near a given postal code or address, including hours of operation and available services.

hasPart.name: Canada Post Deliver to Post Office API
hasPart.description: Allows customers to select a post office as the delivery destination instead of a residential or commercial address at checkout.

hasPart.name: Canada Post Service Information API
hasPart.description: Provides information about scheduled outages and service disruptions to Canada Post web services.
